projectDescription: A Discord bot that creates balanced teams for custom matches using a modified TrueSkill MMR algorithm with support for margin of victory, rating decay, and ad-hoc N v M matchmaking.
keyFeatures: Modified TrueSkill MMR algorithm with margin of victory support
Automatic team balancing optimized for match quality
Match history with paginated embeds and ASCII rating graphs
Per-player stats including rank, win/loss record, and win percentage
Voice channel management to auto-move players to team channels
publicApiSurface: /start — Start matchmaking lobby with Join/Leave/Start Game buttons
/leaderboard — Display ranked leaderboard by TrueSkill exposure score
/history — Paginated guild-wide match history with embeds
Rating and History (user command) — Per-player stats with rating graph
/test — Generate test matches (admin only, requires kick_members permission)
rate_with_round_score(winners, losers, winner_score, loser_score) — Modified TrueSkill rating with margin of victory
win_probability(a, b) — Calculate win probability for two teams
make_teams(players, guildid) — Balance teams from player pool
record_result(team_a, team_b, team_a_score, team_b_score, guildid) — Record match result and update ratings
get_rating(userid, guildid) — Get TrueSkill rating with decay applied
get_history(guildid, userid) — Fetch match history for guild or player
get_ranks(players, guildid) — Get leaderboard positions for players
